at_a_glance: You have spent $3.33 across 5 sessions today. Phase 1 was the most expensive at $1.30 — 11 tasks including the phase review. Since then costs have stabilised in the $0.44-0.51 range per planning/build session pair. The main cost driver going forward is prompt caching not being active — fixing that alone could cut 20-30% off every remaining session.

session_narratives.2026-04-18-001: Kick-off session covering brainstorm, architect, vibe-new-app, and spec review. Three large planning tasks read and wrote the full SPEC.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, BRIEF.md, and PLAN.md from scratch. Expensive per-token but unavoidable setup cost.
session_narratives.2026-04-18-002: The heaviest session — 11 Phase 1 tasks plus a full phase review and vibe-parallel orchestration. Average $0.12/task, right at the project norm for foundation work. Parallelisation added overhead but saved wall-clock time.
session_narratives.2026-04-18-003: F-STATE feature planning session: vibe-add-feature read all 5 spec files plus index.html, then generated FEATURE_SPEC.md, FEATURE_PLAN.md, FEATURE_TASKS.md. Spec review added $0.14. Near-identical pattern to todays session — consistent.
session_narratives.2026-04-18-004: F-STATE build — 5 tasks (FST-001 through FST-005). Steady $0.10-0.13/task throughout. Context overhead ($0.045) reflects CLAUDE.md + CODEBASE.md being loaded every turn.
session_narratives.2026-04-18-005: F-FIRST-RUN feature planning. Two parallel Explore agents reading index.html, main.js, preload.js, SPEC.md, PLAN.md, CODEBASE.md added ~20K input tokens vs a single-agent approach. Spec review found and fixed 1 P1 + 2 P2 issues.

recommendations.title: Prompt caching off — paying full price every turn
recommendations.body: Zero cache reads across all 5 sessions. CLAUDE.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, and SPEC.md are re-read from scratch every turn. These three files alone are ~15,000 tokens. Enabling Anthropic prompt caching on the stable portions of CLAUDE.md would save ~90% on those reads. The active-feature section changes per session — split it into a stable header cached once and a dynamic footer that changes.

recommendations.title: Parallel agents re-read the same files independently
recommendations.body: This session used 2 Explore subagents in parallel, each reading index.html (~11KB), main.js, preload.js, and SPEC.md independently. That is ~25,000 duplicate input tokens. Consolidate into one agent with a broader prompt, or pre-read large shared files in the parent context and pass excerpts.

forecast_narrative: F-FIRST-RUN has 4 build tasks remaining (FRN-001 through FRN-004), then F-SPEECH and F-CLAUDE each need planning + build sessions. F-ACTIONS is smaller. Expect 4-5 more sessions at the current $0.44-0.51 range — roughly $2.00-2.50 to complete Phase 2. Phase 3 polish will be cheaper ($0.30-0.50 total). Full project estimate: $5.80-6.30. Fixing CP-05 (caching) before the F-SPEECH build session could save $0.30-0.50 off that total.
